overview: Based on the published agenda, the Administrative Policy Committee of the Village of Kronenwetter was scheduled to meet on June 15, 2026, to review the 2024 audit, consider assessment and revaluation services proposals, and address budget amendments and a musician contract for the National Night Out event.

agenda.item: APPROVAL OF MINUTES - May 19, 2026 Administrative Policy Committee Meeting Minutes
2020-2024 Comparison Stats For Past Five Audits
Soli Sax Quartet Musician Contract for National Night Out
CONSIDERATION OF ITEMS FOR FUTURE AGENDA

discussions.body: The committee was scheduled to review the 2024 audit as part of its oversight responsibilities. This review was set to examine the Village's financial records and audit findings from the previous fiscal year.

discussions.item: 2020-2024 Comparison Stats For Past Five Audits
discussions.body: The committee was expected to consider a comparative analysis of audit statistics across the five-year period from 2020 to 2024. This review was scheduled to provide historical context and identify trends in the Village's financial position.

The committee was set to review proposals for assessment and revaluation services. This item was expected to involve consideration of options for property assessment and revaluation services for the Village.

discussions.item: Soli Sax Quartet Musician Contract for National Night Out
discussions.body: The committee was scheduled to consider a musician contract with the Soli Sax Quartet for the Village's National Night Out event. This item involved action on entertainment services for a community event.
The committee was expected to take action on two budget amendments. These amendments were set for discussion and possible approval as part of the Village's budget management.

publicComment: Public comment was on the agenda with a 15-minute total time limit and a three-minute time period per person, with possible extension at the Chief Presiding Officer's discretion.
actionItems: Scheduled to approve or amend the May 19, 2026 Administrative Policy Committee Meeting Minutes
Expected to consider Assessment and Revaluation Services Proposals
Expected to consider the Soli Sax Quartet Musician Contract for National Night Out
Scheduled to vote on Budget Amendments #1 and #2
title: Administrative Policy Committee Meeting - 2026-06-15
